title: Cat Font
description: smooth font that makes uppercase letters and some symbols catified!
body:
# Cat Font
![The minecraft options menu, using a custom cat themed font.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/VWpXPeKX/images/5381099d4681038d01be455b58d38ed7c434c959.png)

A custom font with higher resolution letters, simple shading and a cat theme! 

Currently for 1.8.9, may not be fully compatible for later versions, though more version support is planned in future updates.
